title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 32–34, this part focuses on Unknown person #25, Unknown person #26, Unknown person #27, Nami as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: That wasn't the real one!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today, your chances of finding the real me are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Be careful when leaving the house today...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Although atmospheric pressure is stable,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Black clouds have been seen forming amidst strong winds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: While they remain stationary,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: wayward thunderbolts may find their way to your chest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Those with weak hearts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Should take extra care!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Dark Cloud...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Tempo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lightning again? I've already shown you that I can block that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as I keep my guard up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: but the flaw in that technique...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that you can't move around while using it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Seems like you're still under-estimating me...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really expect your attacks could break through me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Soap Sheep!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't have to guess which one is the real you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll hit everything with my relax AWA Tsunami!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Tidal Wave!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm toast if I take that head on!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The body left lying down on the floor after this attack...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: ...is the real one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Cyclone tempo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The wind is actually blowing away my bubbles....!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
